prompt: Create a warm 2.5D flat hand-drawn doodle illustration like a gentle fairy-tale diary entry, on a clean white background with colorful crayon and marker textures. Show a young couple taking a casual daytime selfie-style pose: exactly 2 faceless people in the foreground, with softly blurred blank facial areas and expressive body language. The woman stands on the left with long wavy dark brown hair, wearing an olive-green jacket over a brown top, a beige pleated skirt with a black-and-white plaid waistband, and a dark brown quilted shoulder bag; her hands rest confidently on her hips. The man stands on the right, slightly taller, with short black tousled hair, wearing a pale yellow trench coat over a blue-and-white striped shirt, holding one hand close to the viewer in a playful peace sign. Surround them with a cheerful everyday neighborhood doodle scene: exactly 3 rounded trees, 1 smiling orange sun with rays, 1 small blue car, 1 bright yellow cafe building with blue roof trim, blue-and-white striped awning, blue door, white windows, and 1 sidewalk chalkboard sign reading CAFE with a pink heart. Add exactly 3 pink hearts, exactly 3 star doodles, exactly 1 yellow flower, plus scattered tiny circles, crosses, squiggles, dots, and confetti marks in blue, pink, yellow, orange, green, and purple. Use thick imperfect outlines, visible scribble strokes, soft painterly shading on the people, playful proportions, cozy romantic mood, and a nostalgic scrapbook-photo feeling, as if a real daily snapshot was transformed into a tender children’s picture-book memory. Use a bright palette dominated by sunny yellow, olive green, sky blue, pink, and warm brown, with no photorealism and no hard shadows.
